sprint.goal: Reduce false-positive governance denials blocking swarm agents: #1202 (KE-2 AAB normalization — strip rtk/time/timeout prefixes) → #1208 (heredoc false positive) → #1139 ($(date) command scanner allowlist). [#1209 closed via #1243. #1202 closed via #1252. #1208 closed via #1238.]

senior.title: $(date) scanner allowlist — PR #1274 open, CI green
senior.note: #1202 DONE (PR #1252 merged — stripCommandWrappers in aab.ts, 13 tests). #1139 fix is PR #1274: stripSafeSubshells() in command-scanner.ts, 20 new tests, CI 4/4 green. Awaiting merge.

copilot-cli.title: Sprint items complete — available for next sprint
copilot-cli.note: #1208 DONE (PR #1238 merged — stripHeredocBody in definitions.ts, 9 tests, +12 invariants total). Available for new work.

prs.title: fix(matchers): safe-subshell allowlist — prevent $(date) false positives
prs.note: Core fix: stripSafeSubshells() strips 9 read-only subshell families before destructive scan. 20 tests: unit per family, integration (destructive still fires through safe subshells), security (nested subshells NOT stripped), scanner-level integration. ReDoS-safe: [^)(]* argument pattern. Supersedes #1255.

coverageGaps.description: 20 tests in PR #1274 (not yet merged) cover stripSafeSubshells unit + integration + security. Gap closes on merge.

testHealth.dogfoodNotes: pnpm node_modules/turbo symlink was dangling (pointed to deleted worktree agentguard-autonomous-sdlc--coder-agent-2117057). Fixed via pnpm install --force from agent-guard root. Turbo cache restored. No governance blocks encountered during this QA run.

completedIssues.note: persona.env operational exemption in no-governance-self-modification invariant
MCP prefix match: AAB normalizeIntent now uses startsWith() for mcp.call target.
stripHeredocBody() isolates command header before invariant scan. 9 tests (+12 invariants total with surrounding work).
stripCommandWrappers() strips rtk/time/timeout prefixes before git/github detection in aab.ts. 13 tests (+23 kernel total with surrounding work). Addresses Gap A of #1202.
